title: Skills
text:
My work sits at the intersection of enterprise operations, business analysis, and systems transformation, where structured thinking and disciplined execution drive operational reliability.










Area
Strengths




Business Analysis
Problem framing, root-cause analysis, scenario-based reasoning, translation of business pain points into process improvements


Enterprise Operations
Procure-to-Pay workflow governance, transaction lifecycle monitoring, backlog and aging management, exception resolution


Systems Transformation
User Acceptance Testing (UAT), workflow validation, defect identification, support during enterprise system migration


Cross-Functional Execution
Coordination across finance, procurement, operations, and technology stakeholders


Tools and Platforms
SAP S/4HANA, ServiceNow, Fieldglass, TeamConnect, Advanced Excel, Generative AI tools for business analysis









I break complex operational and business issues into clear components, identify the root cause, and translate findings into practical next steps.



I work effectively in high-volume environments where process discipline, financial control, and operational reliability matter.



I understand how workflows, platforms, and business controls interact, particularly in transformation and migration contexts.





I bring a structured, execution-oriented approach to business problems. My value lies in operating between process, systems, and decision-making, where clarity, reliability, and disciplined follow-through matter as much as analysis itself.

title: Goldman Sachs-trained operations strategist driving financial governance and enterprise systems transformation.
text:
Intro
    
    
      📍 Vancouver, BC · LinkedIn
      My background sits at the intersection of financial operations, enterprise systems, and operational risk. At Goldman Sachs, I worked across Procure-to-Pay workflows governing high-volume transactions and resolving operational breakdowns impacting financial reporting and vendor payments.
      I approach complex business environments through structured analysis and disciplined execution—identifying root causes, improving workflows, and supporting enterprise system transformations.
      This portfolio highlights my experience across operations governance, business analysis, and AI-enabled decision support.

title: Experience
text:
Senior Analyst (2024)
Analyst (2022–2023)
Supported enterprise Procure-to-Pay operations within a global finance environment, focusing on transaction governance, workflow reliability, and operational risk resolution.







Metric
Result




Vendor Transactions Governed
300+ per month


Operational Breaks Resolved
40–60 per quarter


Resolution Time Improvement
8 days → 3 days (63%)


Transactions Reconciled
400–500 per month


UAT Scenarios Executed
40+








Governed 300+ vendor transactions monthly, maintaining operational integrity across enterprise Procure-to-Pay workflows.
Reduced operational issue resolution time from 8 days to 3 days by diagnosing root causes and coordinating fixes with finance and technology teams.
Reconciled 400–500 financial transactions per month, identifying discrepancies and improving reporting accuracy.
Supported Fieldglass migration to TeamConnect enterprise migration by designing and executing 40+ User Acceptance Testing scenarios validating workflow logic and approval controls.
Acted as escalation point for 40–60 recurring operational breaks per quarter, restoring stability across vendor payment workflows.
